description: Slim offline help starter for the Kaidera OS console. The in-app Help view bundles only the setup essentials; the full guide corpus is configured with KAIDERA_OS_DOCS_URL.

guides.title: Getting started with Kaidera OS
guides.summary: Install, run the console, sign in, and learn the layout before you configure anything.

guides.title: Bring your first project online
guides.summary: Register a project, set repo roots, seed the roster, and pick the default agent.

guides.title: Settings deep-dive
guides.summary: The System, Cortex, Workspace, and Extensions surfaces and exactly what to configure in each.
